mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, ref_spec, ref_id, range_type, match_mode, level_prefix, level_nodes, choose_all, ref_ds_type, table_level
mapper.select:
select
from dm_sec_range where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_spec = #{specId} order by gmt_create asc

select
from dm_sec_range where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_id = #{refId} order by gmt_create asc
mapper.update: update dm_sec_range set range_type = #{info.rangeType, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.SecRangeType}, match_mode = #{info.matchMode, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.secrule.SecMatchMode}, level_prefix = #{info.levelPrefix}, level_nodes = #{info.levelNodes, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, choose_all = #{info.chooseAll}, ref_ds_type = #{info.referDsType, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.base.metadata.ds.DataSourceType}, table_level = #{info.tableLevelType, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.sdk.model.analysis.TargetType} where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{rangeId}
mapper.delete: delete from dm_sec_range where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{rangeId}
delete from dm_sec_range where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_spec = #{specId}
delete from dm_sec_range where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and ref_id = #{refId}
